positive: A stylized, geometric representation of a cosmic otter floating amidst swirling nebulae and crystalline stellar dust. The otter should have a sleek, cartoonish silhouette with expressive, minimalist features. Use a palette of deep midnight blues, vibrant turquoise, cosmic purple, and brilliant gold accents. The background should feature intricate, interlocking mandalas and stylized constellations forming a tapestry. Composition must be centered, emphasizing the otter's playful pose and the radial symmetry of the cosmic environment. Clean lines, vector art aesthetic mixed with high-detail cosmic realism. Studio lighting, dramatic depth of field. Perfect for screen printing on dark fabric. UHD, highly detailed, high contrast.
negative: low detail, blurry, noisy, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, asymmetrical, grainy, dirty, faded colors, muted, photorealistic, 3d render
